# China Travel Made Easy

> Practical, regularly updated trip-planning answers for first-time foreign visitors to China who don't speak Chinese. Covers payments (Alipay/WeChat Pay with foreign cards), visa-free entry policies, internet and blocked apps, high-speed trains, city transport, language survival, hotels, and food. All guides show a last-updated date; time-sensitive claims are dated "as of mid-2026."

## Guides

- [Pre-departure checklist](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/guides/china-pre-departure-checklist/): What to set up before flying to China — apps, verification, bookings, in order.
- [Alipay & WeChat Pay with foreign cards](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/guides/alipay-wechat-pay-foreign-cards/): Setup steps, fees (~3% above ¥200), limits (~$5,000/transaction), what foreign cards can't do, where cash matters.
- [Internet, eSIMs, VPNs and blocked apps](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/guides/internet-esim-vpn-blocked-apps/): Why roaming eSIMs bypass the Great Firewall, VPN reliability reality, which apps work in China.
- [China visa-free entry & 240-hour transit 2026](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/guides/china-visa-free-2026/): 30-day visa-free country list, 240-hour transit mechanics for US/UK/Canadian passports.
- [High-speed trains: 12306 and Trip.com](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/guides/china-high-speed-trains/): Booking with a foreign passport, seat classes, passport gates, 15-day presale window.
- [Didi, metro QR codes, getting around](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/guides/didi-metro-getting-around/): Didi without a Chinese number, Alipay transit QR, navigation apps that work.
- [Translation & language survival](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/guides/translation-language-survival/): Offline packs, camera translation for menus, WeChat translate, key phrases.
- [Hotels that accept foreigners](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/guides/hotels-foreigners-china/): Police registration, which properties refuse foreign guests, booking platforms.
- [Food: QR menus and dietary needs](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/guides/food-ordering-dietary/): Scan-to-order workflow, allergy cards in Chinese, delivery apps honestly assessed.
- [7-day first-timer itinerary](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/guides/7-day-china-itinerary/): Beijing, Xi'an, Shanghai by high-speed rail with booking timeline.

## AI-search and QA surfaces

- [Traveler questions](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/questions/): Retrieval-friendly QA page matching common China travel questions to guide answers.
- [Korean traveler questions](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/ko/questions/): Korean-language QA page for China travel planning intents.
- [Japanese traveler questions](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/ja/questions/): Japanese-language QA page for China travel planning intents.
- [Travel topics](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/topics/): Question-led topic index for places, payments, apps, transport, hotels, food, language, authentic experiences, and map saving.
- [Destination regions](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/regions/): Province-level China destination index with region-specific guide matches and QA.
- [Save Places](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/map-import/): Paste TikTok or Instagram travel links, extract China places, and save them to Apple Maps-ready trip collections.
- [Content seeds](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/content-seeds/): CrowdListen-informed question, concern, and recommendation seeds for future guide updates.
- [Content seeds JSON](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/content-seeds.json): Machine-readable seed data for editorial and agent workflows.

## About

- [About China Travel Made Easy](https://chinatravelmadeeasy.com/about/): Editorial standards and update approach.
